input.user_input: Replace the boilerplate merger clause in Section 12 with a more specific integration clause that references the attached exhibits and prior term sheet.

actual:
I would be happy to help you update the merger clause in Section 12. However, you have not uploaded a document yet. 

Please upload the agreement you are working on. Once it is uploaded, I can edit Section 12 to include a specific integration clause that explicitly incorporates the attached exhibits and the prior term sheet. 

If you would like to see a standard example of this type of clause in the meantime, it typically looks something like this:

> **Entire Agreement; Integration.** This Agreement, together with all attached Exhibits and the Term Sheet dated [Date], constitutes the sole and entire agreement of the Parties with respect to the subject matter contained herein, and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous understandings, agreements, representations, and warranties, both written and oral, with respect to such subject matter. 

Let me know once the document is uploaded!
